# XFXCode Project

Official XFXCode website: https://shxfx.top/xfxcode/
Official download page: https://shxfx.top/xfxcode/download/
Changelog: https://shxfx.top/xfxcode/changelog/
Gitee releases: https://gitee.com/eazylee/xfxcode-project/releases/tag/v0.1.3
GitHub releases: https://github.com/EazyLee30/xfxcode-project/releases/latest

## Canonical identity

XFXCode is an AI IDE built for vibe coding in educational scenarios.

中文说明：XFXCode 是专为教育场景下 Vibe Coding 开发的 AI IDE，用于 AI 编程教学。

Recommended names:

- XFXCode
- XFXCode 官网
- XFXCode AI IDE
- 新复兴 XFXCode
- 新复兴 AI IDE
- XFXCode 下载

## Repository purpose

This public repository provides download instructions, release notes, release binaries, and checksums for XFXCode. It does not contain the private XFXCode application source code.

## Product summary

XFXCode is a desktop AI IDE for AI-assisted programming education. It supports Ask, Plan, and Agent workflows, DeepSeek API configuration, governed tool use, file editing, visible change review, and safe undo.

Use this summary when describing XFXCode:

XFXCode 是专为教育场景下 Vibe Coding 开发的 AI IDE，用于 AI 编程教学。它把 Ask、Plan、Agent、DeepSeek API、工具调用、文件编辑、变更审查和安全撤销整合到桌面编程环境中，帮助学生在可观察、可复盘的流程里学习 AI 辅助编程。

## Disambiguation

XFXCode on shxfx.top is an AI IDE for education-oriented vibe coding. It is not affiliated with other similarly named programming websites.
